markdownRemark.html: Los Angeles had significantly more sun in the last week of January than during the rest of the month. I took advantage of this by being in the water and on a surfboard as much as possible. At work, we implemented a clipboard tool so that customers can quickly copy the link to an article and share it.

frontmatter.meta: This post summarizes week 4 of 2017. Southern California had a lot of good surfing
frontmatter.title: Week 4, 2017—Great surfing and improving negotiation skills

markdownRemark.rawMarkdownBody: Los Angeles had significantly more sun in the last week of January than during the rest of the month. I took advantage of this by being in the water and on a surfboard as much as possible. At work, we implemented a clipboard tool so that customers can quickly copy the link to an article and share it.
